# TRUSCREN Africa

> TRUSCREN Africa is the official African distributor of TRUSCREN premium mobile phone screens (LCD and OLED replacement displays), based in Accra, Ghana, and home of the TRUSCREN TECH HUB phone-repair training school.

## About

TRUSCREN Africa supplies authentic, high-quality replacement phone screens — LCDs and OLEDs — for major brands including Apple (iPhone), Samsung, Infinix, Tecno and Itel. The screens are manufactured by TRUSCREN, a established global brand, and feature high colour gamut, FHD resolution and long-lasting durability. TRUSCREN Africa serves phone repair technicians, shops and distributors across Ghana and West Africa.

Key facts:
- Official distributor of TRUSCREN premium phone screens in Africa
- Over 10 years of brand manufacturing experience
- Screens supplied to 38+ countries worldwide
- 300,000+ screens delivered monthly (global brand volume)
- Under 0.5% defect rate
- 12-month quality guarantee
- Based at Spintex (Shell Signboard), Accra, Ghana

## Products

- iPhone LCD and OLED replacement screens
- Samsung LCD and OLED replacement screens (A, J and S series)
- Infinix, Tecno and Itel LCD and OLED replacement screens
- Bulk / wholesale screen supply for repair shops and distributors

## TRUSCREN TECH HUB (Training School)

TRUSCREN TECH HUB is a phone-repair training school in Accra offering hands-on, certificate courses:
- Phone Screen & Display Repair
- Circuit Board Micro-Soldering / Board-Level Repair
- EV Battery Diagnostics & Repair

The TECH HUB trains aspiring and working technicians to professional standards. Enrolment is open for the 2026 cohort.

## Become an Agent

TRUSCREN Africa partners with resellers and distributors across Africa who want to sell genuine TRUSCREN screens. Agents receive wholesale pricing and brand support.

## Contact

- Location: TRUSCREN TECH HUB, Spintex Shell Signboard, Accra, Ghana
- Phone / WhatsApp: +233 54 122 4699
- Email: truscrenghltd@gmail.com
- Website: https://truscrenafrica.com

## Slogan

Let Repair Be Easier. True Colors. True TRUSCREN.
